# COC Concertz

> Free live metaverse concerts hosted by The ZAO. No wallet required. Runs on Spatial.io with Arweave archiving and on-chain WaveWarZ music battles.

## Overview

COC Concertz (Concertz of Culture) is a recurring live music event where artists perform inside a metaverse venue. Attendance is free and open — no NFT, no ticket, no wallet needed. The show is streamed into a Spatial.io room accessible from any browser. Every show is archived to Arweave, making the performance permanent.

COC is produced by The ZAO, a decentralized music community on Base chain. COC #7: WaveWarZ Takeover launched Jul 18 2026 as the first open-access pilot (wallet gate disabled).

## What Happens at a Show

- DJ Zaal plays live sets inside the Spatial.io metaverse room
- WaveWarZ music battles run: two songs compete, crowd votes the winner on-chain
- Attendees upload art, photos, and clips to the Arweave archive gallery
- A contest runs for the best gallery upload each show
- All uploads and winner data are permanently stored on Arweave

## WaveWarZ Battles

WaveWarZ is a live Solana music-battle prediction market incubated by The ZAO. At each COC show, two WaveWarZ artists are pitted song-vs-song. The crowd votes inside the room. The winner advances on the WaveWarZ leaderboard.

Top WaveWarZ artists by SOL trading volume (2026-07-17):
- STILOWORLD: 41.6 SOL (@wifiiswater)
- Geek Myth: 30.9 SOL (@GeEkMyTh_ETH)
- Lui: 30.0 SOL (@Cryptogodlui)
- Cannon Jones: 15.5 SOL (@cannonjones973)

## Stack

- [Next.js 15](https://nextjs.org): App Router, TypeScript
- [Spatial.io](https://spatial.io): Metaverse venue — browser-native, no download required
- [Firebase / Firestore](https://firebase.google.com): Real-time visitor counts, gallery uploads, contest entries
- [Supabase](https://supabase.com): Archive upload records, show metadata
- [Cloudinary](https://cloudinary.com): Media transforms for gallery uploads
- [Solana](https://solana.com): WaveWarZ battle protocol
- [Arweave](https://arweave.org): Permanent archive of all show uploads
- [Vercel](https://vercel.com): Hosting

## Live Endpoints

- `GET https://cocconcertz.com/api/metrics/coc[N]` — show-night metrics: concurrent viewers, gallery uploads, contest submissions
- `GET https://cocconcertz.com/api/stats/visit` — current live viewer count (Firestore)
- `POST https://cocconcertz.com/api/upload` — gallery upload (wallet optional in pilot mode)

## Shows

- COC #1–#6: wallet-gated, Spatial.io venue
- COC #7: Jul 18 2026, WaveWarZ Takeover, wallet gate DISABLED (open-access pilot)
- COC #8: target Aug 2026 (date TBD)

## Links

- [Ticket / Entry](https://ticket.cocconcertz.com): Single-click entry to the Spatial.io room
- [Gallery](https://cocconcertz.com/archive): Arweave-backed show archive
- [WaveWarZ](https://wavewarz.info): Live music battle platform
- [The ZAO on Farcaster](https://warpcast.com/~/channel/the-zao): Community channel
- [Source](https://github.com/bettercallzaal/CoCConcertZ): Open-source
